contents.title: AI Definition Request v1
contents.description: Canonical request envelope for asking AI or tools for the definition of a GameNext term, with explicit context and scope for disambiguation.

term.description: The term to define (e.g., grimeAdhesion, CIC, nanite geometry).

context.description: Optional domain context to narrow the meaning of the term.

scope.description: Level of detail requested: short summary, full explanation, or contract-level (schema/field focused).

termScope.description: Whether to look for GameNext-internal terms, broader industry terms, or both.

maxTokens.description: Optional budget hint for the length of the returned definition.

preferredSchemas.description: Optional list of schema or contract IDs that the definition should prioritize when multiple meanings exist.

language.description: Optional IETF language tag (e.g., en-US) for localized documentation output.

meta.description: Optional opaque metadata for tooling (trace IDs, client IDs, etc.).
